channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: These groups are pushing for the NFL to end facial recognition
item.description: Ahead of Super Bowl Sunday, online privacy groups Fight for the Future and the Algorithmic Justice League are reiterating a call for the NFL to put an end to the use of facial recognition in football stadiums, where the groups say the technology is used to authenticate employees, vendors, and author
item.dc:creator: Steven Melendez, Fast Company

item.title: Academic researchers are going to have to learn algospeak
item.description: Imagine you’re an academic researcher. You’re writing a pitch for funding to the National Science Foundation (NSF), the independent agency of the federal government that funds projects designed to advance our understanding of the world.
item.dc:creator: Chris Stokel-Walker, Fast Company

item.title: Opinion: Tesla’s awful numbers put Musk back into campaign mode
item.description: Very little looks good on EV company's balance sheet, but Tesla chairman tries every way possible to spark excitement.
item.dc:creator: Liam Denning, The Mercury News

item.title: Nvidia GeForce Now Subscription Plans Suspended Due to Payment System Transition - Gaming News
item.description: Nvidia GeForce Now subscription plans are currently unavailable, with day passes expected to return in about two weeks, while full subscriptions may take longer due to a payment system transition.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: LG recalls 500K electric ovens after fires, pet deaths
item.description: According to the recall, the front-mounted knobs on the recalled ranges can be accidentally activated by humans or pets.
item.dc:creator: Brady Doran, NewsNation

item.title: Nvidia could be drastically reducing RTX 4060 GPU supply right now – another heavy hint that the RTX 5060 is imminent
item.description: Nvidia’s RTX 4060 graphics cards could be getting rarer on the shelves before too long – but that’s no reason to panic, in fact it’s a good thing.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Windows PowerToys: Your handy productivity toolbox
item.description: Back in the 1990s, Windows power users often availed themselves of a set of small, free software tools from Microsoft collectively known as “PowerToys.” (Read about their history at Wikipedia.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Honeywell Leverages Gen AI Across Business for Improved Productivity
item.description: Honeywell, a Fortune 500 company, is leveraging generative AI (gen AI) across its business to drive improved productivity, collaboration, and innovation.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: New law in Brazil is making students put away their smartphones at school
item.description: SAO PAULO (AP) — Brazilian students returned to class this week with a new task: staying away from their smartphones as a new law restricting their use in schools took effect.
item.dc:creator: GABRIELA SÁ PESSOA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: This startup can measure custom insoles with just an iPhone camera
item.description: The Brannock device—that sliding metal gadget used in shoe stores to measure the dimensions of your feet—was invented 100 years ago this year. But footwear fitting hasn’t really gotten more advanced since, says Dan Cataldi, founder and CEO of custom insole maker Groov.
item.dc:creator: Steven Melendez, Fast Company

item.title: GSA plans moving staff to Interior headquarters, as its tech shop anticipates more shakeups
item.description: GSA senior leaders are saying the Trump administration’s long-term goal is to merge GSA, OPM and OMB into a single agency. The post GSA plans moving staff to Interior headquarters, as its tech shop anticipates more shakeups first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jory Heckman, Federal News Network

item.title: Lawmakers unveil measure banning DeepSeek on government devices
item.description: A bipartisan pair of lawmakers are introducing a measure this week to ban Chinese artificial intelligence app DeepSeek from government devices, arguing the app "compromises American users' sensitive data.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Nebraska government system shutdown disrupts the Legislature, DMV and other offices
item.description: OMAHA, Neb. (AP) — A systemwide outage of state goverment computers shut down everything from the work of the Legislature to driver’s licensing offices for several hours Thursday.
item.dc:creator: MARGERY A. BECK, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Hundreds of rigged votes can skew AI model rankings on Chatbot Arena, study finds
item.description: The generative AI revolution has turned into a global race, with mixtures of models from private companies and open-source initiatives all competing to become the most popular and powerful.
item.dc:creator: Chris Stokel-Walker, Fast Company

item.title: OpenAI looks across US for sites to build its Trump-backed Stargate AI data centers
item.description: OpenAI is scouring the U.S. for sites to build a network of huge data centers to power its artificial intelligence technology, expanding beyond a flagship Texas location and looking across 16 states to accelerate the Stargate project championed by President Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: Matt O'Brien, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Telescopes spy a monster radio jet streaming from a bright and early object in the universe
item.description: Telescopes around the world have spotted a monster radio jet streaming from a quasar dating back to the first 1 billion years of the universe.
item.dc:creator: Marcia Dunn, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Airlines are finally embracing Apple’s AirTags—which means lost luggage could be a thing of the past
item.description: There’s nothing more annoying than arriving at your destination and finding that your checked baggage didn’t make the trip. But thanks to Apple’s new partnership with 15 different airlines, it’s easier than ever to track down your lost luggage—provided you have the right $29 gadget.
item.dc:creator: Michael Grothaus, Fast Company

item.title: Realtor.com leaves Santa Clara to set up headquarters in Texas
item.description: Damian Eales, chief executive officer of Realtor.com, said Texas’s growing talent pool, low cost of living and expansion of the housing stock were part of its appeal.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: Oracle’s HR software now has AI agents to help with taxes and career planning
item.description: Oracle’s new AI agents will answer employee questions about everything job-related, from hiring to retiring.
item.dc:creator: Jocelyn Mintz, Fast Company
